caption: A news anchor in a dark suit, white shirt, and red tie speaks from a studio setting. Behind him is a blue and teal graphic featuring the text "PLUS POLITICS". Beside the anchor is a smaller inset window displaying a man wearing a red cap, identified by on-screen text as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS", under the heading "ON THE PHONE". A purple banner at the bottom of the screen reads "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". The top portion of the screen features a logo with a stylized colorful circle. Throughout the sequence, the anchor remains in the same position, gesturing with his hands as he speaks, while the inset image of the analyst remains static. Additional text at the bottom provides links and calls to action, including "SUBSCRIBE", "W W W.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE", "WATCH ONLINE", and "W W W.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV".
